title: Smoky Charred Argentinian Chorizo Bowl
description: A charred, creamy, and festive Argentinian dish featuring blue food colouring and served in a stone bowl. A perfect anti-inflammatory-friendly option for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat and cook the chorizo for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until nicely charred.
Cut the red onion and red bell pepper into strips and grill for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until tender.
Toss the blue potatoes with a little oil and season with salt and pepper. Grill for 5 minutes on each side, or until slightly charred.
Transfer the potatoes to a large stone bowl and top with the grilled chorizo, onion, and bell pepper.
Drizzle with a creamy chipotle aioli and sprinkle with chopped fresh cilantro.
